text:
records for the sampled beneficiaries are identified in the encounter files. 

SHORT NAME: SAMPLE_GROUP 

LONG NAME: SAMPLE_GROUP 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CCW 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: 01 = Beneficiary included in the 1 percent sample for the year 
04 = Beneficiary included in the 4 percent sample for the year 
15 = Beneficiary included in the 15 percent sample for the year 
Null/missing = Beneficiary not included in any sample
